title: SRSCards
description: Spaced repetition card definitions. Generated by Material Forge, exported to Anki via genanki, used by Training Conductor for in-session retrieval probes. Schema mirrors both Anki note model and target Postgres srs_cards table.

anki_config.description: Hardcoded IDs for Anki export. Generated once, never changed — changing IDs creates duplicates on re-import.

model_id_basic.description: genanki Model ID for basic Q&A cards

model_id_cloze.description: genanki Model ID for cloze deletion cards

model_id_reversed.description: genanki Model ID for reversible cards

deck_id.description: genanki Deck ID for the main deck

deck_name.description: Deck name, using :: for subdeck hierarchy, e.g. 'Python::Data Structures::Lists'

task_class_id.description: FK to learning plan task class

card_id.description: Stable unique ID. Used for genanki GUID generation and for linking in-session probes to exported cards.

component_id.description: AGE vertex ID this card assesses. Stored as hidden field in Anki note for round-trip tracking.

card_type.description: Card format. basic=Q->A, cloze=fill-in-blank, reversed=bidirectional, open_ended=generative, comparison=contrast two concepts

front.description: Question / prompt / cloze text. For cloze: use {{c1::answer}} syntax. HTML formatting allowed.

knowledge_type.description: What kind of knowledge this card targets

difficulty_estimate.description: Estimated difficulty (0=trivial, 1=very hard). Informs FSRS initial difficulty.

review_state.description: Current review state. Updated from Anki imports or in-session probes.

design_notes.description: Why this card was designed this way — for quality review and iteration
